Migration streams union across packages into one injectable
migrations.Sources; a migrate command applies them explicitly with the db
and dialect the app provides. Nothing runs unless the command is selected.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations v0.0.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations => MIGRATIONSDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/db.go --
package shared

import (
	"database/sql"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
)

//fabrik:provider
func NewDB() (*sql.DB, error) { return sql.Open("sqlite", "file:app.db") }

//fabrik:provider
func NewDialect() migrations.Dialect { return migrations.DialectSQLite }

//fabrik:cli:command
func MigrateDB(ctx cli.Context, db *sql.DB, d migrations.Dialect, src migrations.Sources) error {
	return src.Migrate(ctx, db, d)
}
-- shared/migrations.go --
package shared

import "embed"

//fabrik:migrations
//go:embed all:migrations
var Migrations embed.FS
-- shared/migrations/0001_users.sql --
CREATE TABLE users (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
-- todos/migrations.go --
package todos

import "embed"

//fabrik:migrations
//go:embed all:migrations
var Migrations embed.FS
-- todos/migrations/0001_todos.sql --
CREATE TABLE todos (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY);
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

//fabrik:http GET /{$}
func Home(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {}
-- want/main.gen.go --
// Code generated by fabrik. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate with: fabrik wire

package main

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"
	"github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/migrations"

	"app/shared"
	"app/todos"
)

func run() int {
	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()
	sigc := make(chan os.Signal, 2)
	signal.Notify(sigc, os.Interrupt, syscall.SIGTERM)
	defer signal.Stop(sigc)
	go func() {
		<-sigc
		cancel()
		<-sigc
		os.Exit(1)
	}()

	root := &cli.Command{
		Name: "app",
		Subcommands: []*cli.Command{
			{
				Name: "migrate-db",
				Run: func(ctx cli.Context) error {
					db, dialect, sources, err := buildMigrateDB(ctx)
					if err != nil {
						return err
					}
					return shared.MigrateDB(ctx, db, dialect, sources)
				},
			},
		},
	}
	return root.Exec(os.Args[1:], cli.WithSignalContext(ctx))
}

func buildMigrateDB(ctx context.Context) (*sql.DB, migrations.Dialect, migrations.Sources, error) {
	// Providers
	sharedSqlDB, err := shared.NewDB()
	if err != nil {
		return nil, 0, nil, err
	}

	sharedMigrationsDialect := shared.NewDialect()
	migrationSources := migrations.Sources{
		{Stream: "shared", FS: shared.Migrations, Dir: "migrations"},
		{Stream: "todos", FS: todos.Migrations, Dir: "migrations"},
	}
	return sharedSqlDB, sharedMigrationsDialect, migrationSources, nil
}
